action_set_definitions.name: search_patient_by_complaint
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the clinical database using a string description of symptoms to identify the correct patient record.

complaint_description.description: The specific symptoms or chief complaint reported by the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state for a specific patient, including vitals, biomarkers, symptom severity, and disease stage.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_clinical_examination
action_set_definitions.description: Conducts a physical exam or diagnostic imaging to identify specific tooth issues and measure biological health indices (plaque control/gingival bleeding).

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_emergency_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Phase I: Performs immediate clinical actions to resolve acute pain or infection.

tooth_id.description: The specific tooth requiring emergency treatment.

procedure_type.description: The specific emergency procedure (e.g., pulpectomy, incision and drainage).

action_set_definitions.name: execute_etiotropic_therapy
action_set_definitions.description: Phase II: Executes procedures to stabilize underlying disease, specifically periodontal therapy and caries control.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_restorative_care
action_set_definitions.description: Phase III: Provides definitive restorative treatment (e.g., crowns, fillings, bridges) once the patient is biologically stable.

action_set_definitions.name: enroll_in_maintenance_program
action_set_definitions.description: Phase IV: Transitions the patient into a long-term preventive recall program based on their clinical risk profile.

recall_interval_months.description: The frequency of recall based on risk (e.g., 3, 4, or 6 months).

state_description.vital_signs: Current physiological vitals including blood pressure, heart rate, and temperature.
state_description.biomarkers: Key laboratory values relevant to the treatment plan.
state_description.symptom_severity: A map of symptom names to their severity level (1-10).
state_description.treatment_history: Chronological list of actions previously taken in this episode of care.
state_description.disease_progression_stage: The current stage of the underlying condition (e.g., Stable, Acute, Recovery).
